1. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 12/16/24, 5:23 AM
    
    The Freehaven leaders and the people of Varnhold camp in the shadow of two hills on the steppes of the Nomen Heights. A dozen campfires flicker in the hollow, their light reflected in the tired but hopeful faces of the rescued villagers. Above, the stars gleam, offering a quiet promise of peace after chaos. A smaller fire burns at the edge of the camp, where the leaders of Freehaven sit apart. Lucas lies still, his pallor striking in the firelight, his condition drawing quiet glances of worry. Riven crouches beside the fire, poking the embers until flames lick hungrily at the wood. Beside him, Feywind rests, its runes glowing faintly, mirroring the inner flicker of the flames. The murmur of Varnholder voices drifts faintly on the breeze, but here, at the edge of the camp, the mood is different. Leaning back, Riven lets the warmth wash over him, a rare smile breaking across his face. “I wasn’t sure we’d survive that tomb, even with all our preparation. But here we are—alive, together. You lot… you’re the best friends I could ask for.” He glances at the bag containing Vordekai’s severed head, patting it with a small chuckle. “For months, I’ve tried not to think too much about the future. The risk of loss—it was too distracting. But now, with Vordekai just a memory, I think… I think I dare to hope again.” Riven’s gaze sweeps the circle, his expression carefree and full of life. “So, what about you? What do you hope for? What’s next for you?” @Danny @Darren [Pavel] @Slava [Astor] @Jon [Lucas] @Billy [Milo] @Tom [Lee]
    
    [](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1317950119580270592/1317950122935713832/fixedpoint_Digital_art_of_Riven_a_muscular_male_elf_ranger._He__f7f9031f-d387-4f58-b72e-2a4a342dd948.webp?ex=6a1dea33&is=6a1c98b3&hm=9b47cd33c53d47872cd4b00c9361ec1a2248bc5c72ccc8483f3a1f8f59f6c392&)
    
    ![Image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1317950119580270592/1317950122935713832/fixedpoint_Digital_art_of_Riven_a_muscular_male_elf_ranger._He__f7f9031f-d387-4f58-b72e-2a4a342dd948.webp?ex=6a1dea33&is=6a1c98b3&hm=9b47cd33c53d47872cd4b00c9361ec1a2248bc5c72ccc8483f3a1f8f59f6c392&=&format=webp&width=700&height=700)![](data:image/png;base64,)
    

    
3. ### Danny _—_ 12/16/24, 5:33 PM
    
    The cyclops lych’s gem eye within the cloth within the satchel seems to tug at everyone’s mind. Everyone at the fire has occasional thoughts of wanting to take a closer look at it.
    
4. In answer to Riven’s question, Lucas drools.
    
5. ### Jon [Lucas] _—_ 12/17/24, 5:10 AM
    
    Correction: Lucas drools _dignifiedly._
    
6. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 12/17/24, 5:49 AM
    
    Pavel concentrates on squirting broth into Lucas's mouth from a mechanical udder crafted by Milo (@Billy [Milo]). He gently wipes away the dignified spillage cascading down Lucas's neck onto his clothes, looks over at Riven, and says, "Well, my first priority is my patient. I want to get Lucas back on his feet, no matter what Aunt Sumi says."
    
7. "After that? Well, I think I need to spend some time with the animals. I have some combat techniques I want to try out with Cat. And I'm concerned about Bird, I don't think he's thriving. Normally his kind are much bigger by this age." He frowns worriedly. "Oh, I should probably visit Nightmarch too. Check in on the Scouts. Not that they need me anymore."
    
8. ### Wes [Riven] _—_ 12/17/24, 11:02 AM
    
    Riven chuckles softly at Pavel’s mention of Bird, shaking his head as he stokes the fire, sending a brief spray of sparks skyward. “I don’t know, Pavel. Maybe Bird just needs a change of scenery—fresh air back in Nightmarch or a feast. Brumble always seemed to eat his way through a growth spurt.” He leans back, a soft smile tugging at the corner of his mouth. “Speaking of—gods, I miss that bear.” Riven’s grin widens as he looks toward Pavel. “Think you’ll actually stay inside the walls this time? Astor’s mansion is finally built—he might even let you stretch out on that enormous couch of his. And, after enough my pestering, there’s talk that a grove is being built in the city.” He shifts his gaze to Benedin, his tone easing into quiet curiosity. “What about you, Benedin? Working on a new ritual, maybe? And how’s Bronzeshield Hold coming along? Have Linzi’s words started to bring your people back?”
    
9. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 12/17/24, 5:15 PM
    
    **"Linzi's words have indeed, some youngblood cousins have moved in. Mostly useless, the lot, but they're barely a hundred. They'll wisen up, I'm sure. That is, if the other guest our recent exposure has invited can be dealt with..."** _Benedin clicks his tongue, frustrated._ **"I've been long thinking what I could do about it. I'm not much good at hiding and lying in waiting to catch them. And while a few rituals might snare him, they might as easily be tripped by an innocent townsfolk. Not quite sure what to do."** **"I'll probably stay home while you figure out what's the next step to revenge on that red-haired devil. Maybe the arsonist will be less bold while I'm home, or I'll get lucky enough to get my hands on them."** **"Beyond that, I'm still trying to understand Eclipsed Incantations... there's some powerful magic in there. Most of it beyond my ken, for now. There's a binding circle ritual that may explain the night demons, but it could be turned to summoning more benevolent spirits."** _He turns and tilts his head towards the sky, the firelight reflecting brightly off his spectacles. He switches to a conspiratorial whisper._ **"That's not even the strongest binding magic in there... there's a way to trap someone forever.** **"I've heard enough stories to know most everything has a weakness, but some things just can't die. This is a way to put them away, for good."**
    
10. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 12/18/24, 6:42 AM
    
    Pavel looks horrified at the thought of being trapped away forever. "That's truly a fate worse than death."
    
11. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 12/18/24, 9:01 AM
    
    **"Indeed, especially if you've lived a life worthy of joining your Gods in their celestial domain. I suppose you don't put much stock in that outcome, Pavel?"**
    
12. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 12/18/24, 11:14 AM
    
    Pavel snorts. "I doubt very much that any god would want me for anything good. I'd rather rest until I'm reborn with other cast-off souls in some future age. But when you've got an ego the size of a god's, it's not surprising if you start to think of mortals as playthings."
